# GPC — Google Play CLI

> Ship Android apps from your terminal. The complete CLI for Google Play Developer API v3.

GPC is a TypeScript CLI that covers 162 Google Play Developer API endpoints. It handles releases, rollouts, metadata, vitals, reviews, subscriptions, in-app products, purchases, reports, users, testers, and more — from one tool.

## Key Facts

- Language: TypeScript (ESM, strict mode)
- Runtime: Node.js 20+ or standalone binary (Bun-compiled)
- Package manager: npm (`npm install -g @gpc-cli/cli`)
- Auth: Service account JSON, OAuth 2.0, Application Default Credentials
- Output: JSON (default in CI/pipe), table (default in TTY), YAML, Markdown
- Exit codes: 0 success, 1 error, 2 usage, 3 auth, 4 API, 5 network, 6 threshold breach, 10 plugin
- Config: `.gpcrc.json` (project), `~/.config/gpc/config.json` (user), `GPC_*` env vars
- Tests: 778+, 90%+ coverage

## Documentation

- Guide: https://yasserstudio.github.io/gpc/guide/
- Commands: https://yasserstudio.github.io/gpc/commands/
- CI/CD: https://yasserstudio.github.io/gpc/ci-cd/
- API Coverage: https://yasserstudio.github.io/gpc/reference/api-coverage
- Security: https://yasserstudio.github.io/gpc/advanced/security
- Plugin Dev: https://yasserstudio.github.io/gpc/advanced/plugins
- SDK Usage: https://yasserstudio.github.io/gpc/advanced/sdk-usage

## Source

- Repository: https://github.com/yasserstudio/gpc
- License: MIT
- Full docs: https://yasserstudio.github.io/gpc/llms-full.txt

## Common Commands

```
gpc auth login --service-account key.json    # Authenticate
gpc releases upload app.aab --track beta     # Upload AAB to track
gpc releases promote --from beta --to production --rollout 10  # Promote with rollout
gpc vitals crashes --threshold 2.0           # CI gate on crash rate (exit 6 if breached)
gpc listings pull --dir metadata/            # Download store listings
gpc listings push --dir metadata/            # Upload store listings
gpc reviews list --stars 1-3 --since 7d      # Recent low-rated reviews
gpc subscriptions list                       # List subscriptions
gpc purchases get <token>                    # Verify a purchase
gpc pricing convert --from USD --amount 9.99 # Regional price conversion
gpc reports download financial --month 2026-02  # Download financial report
gpc users invite user@co.com --developer-id <id> --role ADMIN  # Invite user
gpc testers import --track beta --file testers.csv  # Bulk tester import
gpc publish app.aab --track beta --notes "Bug fixes"  # End-to-end release
gpc status                                   # Cross-track release overview
gpc doctor                                   # Diagnose setup problems
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Description | Default |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| GPC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT | Service account JSON string or file path | — |
| GPC_APP | Default package name | — |
| GPC_PROFILE | Auth profile name | — |
| GPC_OUTPUT | Output format (table, json, yaml, markdown) | auto |
| GPC_NO_COLOR | Disable color output | — |
| GPC_NO_INTERACTIVE | Disable prompts | auto in CI |
| GPC_MAX_RETRIES | Max retry attempts | 3 |
| GPC_TIMEOUT | Request timeout (ms) | 30000 |
| GPC_DEVELOPER_ID | Developer account ID (user management) | — |
| GPC_CA_CERT | Custom CA certificate path | — |
| HTTPS_PROXY | HTTP proxy URL | — |

## Packages (Monorepo)

| Package | npm | Purpose |
|---------|-----|---------|
| gpc | gpc | CLI entry point |
| @gpc-cli/core | @gpc-cli/core | Business logic, command orchestration |
| @gpc-cli/api | @gpc-cli/api | Typed Google Play API client |
| @gpc-cli/auth | @gpc-cli/auth | Authentication (SA, OAuth, ADC) |
| @gpc-cli/config | @gpc-cli/config | Config loading, env vars, profiles |
| @gpc-cli/plugin-sdk | @gpc-cli/plugin-sdk | Plugin interface and hooks |
| @gpc-cli/plugin-ci | @gpc-cli/plugin-ci | CI/CD helpers |
